title: E-RADP: Early Rushing Attack Detection and Prevention in AODV MANETs
author: Zimbele, Getaneh
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This is a repository for AODV protocol modification and simulation packages for paper "Early Rushing Attack Detection and Prevention in AODV MANETs".  
   - It includes 
 
 NS2 installation and setup configuration 
 Rashed AODV Protocol 
 E-RADP Protocol Implementation NS2 files 
 E-RADP Protocol 
 E-RADP Simulation to Related Works
steps_raw:
